ksa_text: Knowledge of executive-level AI risk governance structures and processes, including board and C-suite accountability mechanisms, AI risk committee design, risk escalation protocols, and governance role definitions.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Excluded on seniority grounds: the knowledge carries executive or organizational-authority signals ('c.suite') that place it above the AI Test and Evaluation Specialist level. STRM composite is zero (0.0000 — note: STRM frameworks underweight pure risk vocabulary). RSK practitioners implement and execute within frameworks they do not unilaterally establish at the enterprise level.

pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: External validation confirms exclusion: 1 match(es) in RSK job postings or certification curricula. A gap here would not be noticeable to a working AI Test and Evaluation Specialist.
